## Threat model decision

- [ ] Threat model was reviewed and no update was needed
- [ ] Not a major feature change

## Security checklist

- [ ] CodeQL passed or will pass in this pull request
- [ ] Dependency Review passed or will pass in this pull request
- [ ] npm audit passed or will pass in this pull request
- [ ] Unit tests passed or will pass in this pull request
- [ ] No secrets were added
- [ ] No real patient data was added
- [ ] Security tech lead was requested when needed
